title: Backport workflow-hardening fix (unpinned-uses) to 3 release branches
body:
### Summary The default branch already hardened `.github/workflows/check_cirrus_cron.yml`, `.github/workflows/multi-arch-build.yaml` against the issue(s) below, but **3** release branches still carry it. This proposes the same, minimal, scanner-verified fix for each. ### What's flagged (by [zizmor](https://github.com/woodruffw/zizmor)) - `unpinned-uses` — actions referenced by mutable tag/branch instead of a pinned commit SHA Already resolved on the default branch in: - https://github.com/containers/buildah/commit/67a3b1884d3edd1deba286452975411b9f1ca7fa ### Affected release branches (3) - **`release-1.21`** (still present as of HEAD `1949a14d`) - **`release-1.23`** (still present as of HEAD `81584443`) - **`release-1.20`** (still present as of HEAD `8c365f6c`) ### Suggested per-branch patches Each diff below was checked locally with **zizmor** and **actionlint**: the flagged finding(s) are cleared on the affected construct and no new lint or security findings are introduced. (Whitespace is normalized; only security-relevant lines change.)
release-1.21 — unpinned-uses File `.github/workflows/check_cirrus_cron.yml`; suggested edits: - ~ jobs.$J.steps[uses=dawidd6/action-send-mail].uses : pin(dawidd6/action-send-mail -> target_ref SHA) - ~ jobs.$J.steps[uses=dawidd6/action-send-mail].uses : pin(dawidd6/action-send-mail -> target_ref SHA) ```diff --- a/.github/workflows/check_cirrus_cron.yml +++ b/.github/workflows/check_cirrus_cron.yml @@ -72,7 +72,7 @@ - if: steps.mailto.outputs.csv != '' name: Send failure notification e-mail # Ref: https://github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail - uses: dawidd6/action-send-mail@v2.2.2 + uses: dawidd6/action-send-mail@a80d851dc950256421f1d1d735a2dc1ef314ac8f # v2.2.2 with: server_address: ${{secrets.ACTION_MAIL_SERVER}} server_port: 465 ```
release-1.23 — unpinned-uses File `.github/workflows/check_cirrus_cron.yml`; suggested edits: - ~ jobs.$J.steps[uses=dawidd6/action-send-mail].uses : pin(dawidd6/action-send-mail -> target_ref SHA) - ~ jobs.$J.steps[uses=dawidd6/action-send-mail].uses : pin(dawidd6/action-send-mail -> target_ref SHA) ```diff --- a/.github/workflows/check_cirrus_cron.yml +++ b/.github/workflows/check_cirrus_cron.yml @@ -74,7 +74,7 @@ - if: steps.mailto.outputs.csv != '' name: Send failure notification e-mail # Ref: https://github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail - uses: dawidd6/action-send-mail@v2.2.2 + uses: dawidd6/action-send-mail@a80d851dc950256421f1d1d735a2dc1ef314ac8f # v2.2.2 with: server_address: ${{secrets.ACTION_MAIL_SERVER}} server_port: 465 ```
release-1.20 — unpinned-uses File `.github/workflows/multi-arch-build.yaml`; suggested edits: - ~ jobs.$J.steps[uses=docker/build-push-action].uses : pin(docker/build-push-action -> target_ref SHA) - ~ jobs.$J.steps[uses=docker/build-push-action].uses : pin(docker/build-push-action -> target_ref SHA) - ~ jobs.$J.steps[uses=docker/build-push-action].uses : pin(docker/build-push-action -> target_ref SHA) - ~ jobs.$J.steps[uses=docker/login-action].uses : pin(docker/login-action -> target_ref SHA) - ~ jobs.$J.steps[uses=docker/login-action].uses : pin(docker/login-action -> target_ref SHA) - ~ jobs.$J.steps[uses=docker/setup-buildx-action].uses : pin(docker/setup-buildx-action -> target_ref SHA) - ~ jobs.$J.steps[uses=docker/setup-qemu-action].uses : pin(docker/setup-qemu-action -> target_ref SHA) ```diff --- a/.github/workflows/multi-arch-build.yaml +++ b/.github/workflows/multi-arch-build.yaml @@ -36,16 +36,15 @@ uses: actions/checkout@v2 - name: Set up QEMU - uses: docker/setup-qemu-action@v1 - + uses: docker/setup-qemu-action@27d0a4f181a40b142cce983c5393082c365d1480 # v1 - name: Set up Docker Buildx - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v1 + uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@f211e3e9ded2d9377c8cadc4489a4e38014bc4c9 # v1 with: driver-opts: network=host install: true - name: Build and push local Buildah - uses: docker/build-push-action@v2 + uses: docker/build-push-action@ac9327eae2b366085ac7f6a2d02df8aa8ead720a # v2 with: context: contrib/buildahimage/${{ matrix.source }} file: ./contrib/buildahimage/${{ matrix.source }}/Dockerfile @@ -109,7 +108,7 @@ # Push to buildah Quay repo stable and upstream Buildah - name: Login to buildah Quay registry - uses: docker/login-action@v1 + uses: docker/login-action@dd4fa0671be5250ee6f50aedf4cb05514abda2c7 # v1 if: ${{ steps.image_info.outputs.buildah_push == 'true' }} with: registry: ${{ env.BUILDAH_QUAY_REGISTRY }} @@ -117,7 +116,7 @@ password: ${{ secrets.BUILDAH_QUAY_PASSWORD }} - name: Push images to buildah Quay - uses: docker/build-push-action@v2 + uses: docker/build-push-action@ac9327eae2b366085ac7f6a2d02df8aa8ead720a # v2 if: ${{ steps.image_info.outputs.buildah_push == 'true' }} with: cache-from: type=registry,ref=localhost:5000/buildah/${{ matrix.source }} @@ -133,7 +132,7 @@ # Push to containers Quay repo only stable Buildah - name: Login to containers Quay registry if: ${{ steps.image_info.outputs.containers_push == 'true' }} - uses: docker/login-action@v1 + uses: docker/login-action@dd4fa0671be5250ee6f50aedf4cb05514abda2c7 # v1 with: registry: ${{ env.CONTAINERS_QUAY_REGISTRY}} username: ${{ secrets.CONTAINERS_QUAY_USERNAME }} @@ -141,7 +140,7 @@ - name: Push images to containers Quay if: ${{ steps.image_info.outputs.containers_push == 'true' }} - uses: docker/build-push-action@v2 + uses: docker/build-push-action@ac9327eae2b366085ac7f6a2d02df8aa8ead720a # v2 with: cache-from: type=registry,ref=localhost:5000/buildah/${{ matrix.source }} cache-to: type=inline ```
--- *Happy to open pull requests instead if that's preferred.*

comments.body: @CharlieMCY Feel free to open PRs. Thanks.
These older branches are unused and cron jobs only run on main by design so there is no need to patch these
